source_excerpt: Net operating revenues were $47,941 million in 2025, compared to $47,061 million in 2024, an increase of $880 million, or 2%.
notes: All figures in the claim match the source exactly: $47,941 million in 2025, $880 million increase, and 2% growth rate. The computed change (47,941 − 47,061 = 880) and percentage (880/47,061 ≈ 1.87%, rounds to 2%) are consistent with the source.
